mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.USER_NO, NULL AS USER_NAME, B.STOCK_CODE, B.CONTENT, B.CREATED_AT, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, B.PARENT_ID, B.DELETED_YN, B.DELETED_AT, CASE WHEN BL.USER_NO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LIKED_BY_ME FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN BOARD_LIKE BL ON B.BOARD_NO = BL.BOARD_NO AND BL.USER_NO = #{userNo} WHERE B.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode} AND B.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY NVL(B.PARENT_ID, B.BOARD_NO) DESC, CASE WHEN B.PARENT_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, B.CREATED_AT ASC, B.BOARD_NO ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO, USER_NO, STOCK_CODE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, LIKE_COUNT, PARENT_ID, DELETED_YN, DELETED_AT ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{stockCode}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 0, #{parentId}, 'N', NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.USER_NO, NULL AS USER_NAME, B.STOCK_CODE, B.CONTENT, B.CREATED_AT, NVL(B.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, B.PARENT_ID, B.DELETED_YN, B.DELETED_AT, CASE WHEN BL.USER_NO IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS LIKED_BY_ME FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN BOARD_LIKE BL ON B.BOARD_NO = BL.BOARD_NO AND BL.USER_NO = #{userNo} WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET DELETED_YN = 'Y', DELETED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
UPDATE BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = NVL(LIKE_COUNT, 0) + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
UPDATE BOARD SET LIKE_COUNT = GREATEST(NVL(LIKE_COUNT, 0) - 1, 0) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
